meaning: n.晃晃摇摇的人(或物),思想动摇的人
examples: Wobbler disease is a condition of the cervical vertebrae that causes an unsteady gait and weakness in dogs and horses.
Wobbler disease is also known as cervical vertebral instability, cervical spondylomyelopathy, and cervical vertebral malformation.
The wobbler together with the gas cartridge synchronously rotated with the wheel owing to the effect of the handspike of the gas cartridge on the wobbler, when the utility model is in normal use;
Feeding off a mix of millennial angst and residual technophobia, Wobbler is just one of numerous virus hoaxes circulating by e-mail.
My phone rings every ten minutes to tell me that Martin Bain has been sacked or Walter has thrown a wobbler and walked.
